name: Crabby Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 Package Frozen Crabmeat, thawed and drained, flaked (6 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the shredded cheddar cheese, flour, half & half cream, beaten eggs, thawed and drained crabmeat, green onion slices, salt, and pepper.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Pour the mixture into the unbaked pastry shell.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour.
5. Serves 6 people.
